hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path" <<< "$(cat)"); PROTECTED="biome.json Taskfile.yml .gitignore .claude/settings.json package.json"; for p in $PROTECTED; do if [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]]; then echo "🛑 $FILE is protected! Fix the code, not the config binary!" >&2; exit 2; fi; done'
bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path" <<< "$(cat)"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]]; then task lint 2>&1 | head -n 20; fi'
